author: Blitzo125
name: SP4096 5L MLP6 BigramHash XSA5, val_bpb=1.1636
blurb: 5-layer model with SP4096 tokenizer, 6x MLP expansion, BigramHash embeddings (dim=256, kaiming init), full XSA on all 5 layers, Brotli-11 compression, partial RoPE (32/64 dims), GPTQ-lite calibrated clipping, seq_len=2048
